title: Indomitable
description: The Indomitable mod adds a unique mechanic change for death in Minecraft. Inspired by the phrase "The indomitable human spirit" this mod seeks to give players a second chance to survive before dramatically bleeding out in the snow.
body:
Never underestimate the power of the human spirit. In this mod, I take heavy inspiration from real life events involving near death experiences, and attempt to give the player a similar feeling of determination and grit to survive the harshness and dangers of Minecraft. Every time a player dies, they are knocked unconcious and wake up hours later. If they die on land, they wake up on their back looking up into the sky. If they drown, hopefully they're close enough to land to wash ashore. If they fall into the void, well you just might have to find out.

In order to survive, you only have 5 minutes to stabalize yourself before running out of adrenaline. You are slow, weak, and prone to even the shortest falls. Works in hardcore mode as well. Also great for recovering from weird glitchy deaths that weren't your fault.
